summary: Comprehensive testing of Lucky Jack Lottery Analyzer app completed. All 18 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend fully functional with Swiss Lotto and EuroMillions modes, animated ball machines, personalization, lock positions, and multi-ticket generation all working correctly.
passed_tests: Swiss Lotto root endpoint returns 'Lucky Jack API' message
Swiss Lotto dashboard returns total_draws, hot_numbers, cold_numbers
Swiss Lotto master-predictor returns 6 numbers (1-42) + lucky_prediction (1-6)
Swiss Lotto with birthday parameter works
Swiss Lotto with name parameter works
Swiss Lotto lock positions (lock_p1, lock_p2) respected in prediction
Swiss Lotto max 4 locks validation
Swiss Lotto multi-ticket generation (num_tickets parameter)
EuroMillions health endpoint returns healthy status
EuroMillions stats returns total_draws and statistics
EuroMillions POST master-predictor returns 5 numbers (1-50) + 2 stars (1-12)
EuroMillions with birthday parameter uses Birthday pattern
EuroMillions with name parameter uses Name Energy pattern
EuroMillions lock positions (P1, P2) respected in prediction
EuroMillions multi-ticket generation (5 tickets with confidence scores)
EuroMillions response format includes tickets, total_tickets, price_per_ticket, currency
Swiss Lotto alternate_numbers returned in prediction
EuroMillions confidence scores present in all tickets
Frontend: Swiss Lotto mode toggle works (default active)
Frontend: EuroMillions mode toggle works
Frontend: Swiss Lotto ball machine with 42 balls + Lucky wheel (1-6)
Frontend: EuroMillions ball machine with 50 balls + 2 Star wheels (1-12)
Frontend: Generate button triggers ball animation
Frontend: Personalize section with birthday/name inputs
Frontend: Lock Positions section (4 max for Swiss, 3 max for Euro)
Frontend: Multi-ticket selector (1, 3, 5, 8, 10, 15, 20 options)
Frontend: Multi-ticket results display with confidence percentages
Frontend: Bonus Numbers section expandable
test_credentials: None required - MongoDB runs locally without auth
context_for_next_testing_agent: Lucky Jack app fully functional with dual lottery modes. Swiss Lotto: 6 numbers (1-42) + 1 lucky (1-6), max 4 locks. EuroMillions: 5 numbers (1-50) + 2 stars (1-12), max 3 locks. Both modes support birthday/name personalization and multi-ticket generation (1-20 tickets). Frontend uses animated ball machines with realistic physics. All APIs working: Swiss Lotto GET /api/master-predictor, EuroMillions POST /api/euromillions/master-predictor.
